name: kick-js-monorepo
description: @phxgg/kick.js: a JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Kick.com public API. Includes example apps.
author: phxgg

scripts.bump-deps: npm run ncu:update && npm i && git add . && git commit -m "chore: bump deps"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @phxgg/kick.js && npm run build -w kick-js-example-express
scripts.type:check: npm run type:check -w @phxgg/kick.js && npm run type:check -w kick-js-example-express
